step_rationale: Glucokinase regulator; glucose sensing and hepatic lipid metabolism modulator; protective CAD association via lipid pathways.
mechanism: GCKR variants modulate hepatic glucose and lipid metabolism, reducing atherogenic dyslipidemia and systemic cardiovascular risk.

references.title: Exploring Potential Drug Targets in Multiple Cardiovascular Diseases: A Study Based on Proteome-Wide Mendelian Randomization and Colocalization Analysis.
